goal: int8 weight-only megakernel OUTPERFORM CUDA-graphed cuBLAS bf16 at batch-1 (real, correctness-gated)
method: kernel-only single-launch (vm.relaunch vs cuBLAS g.replay), same 1-token decode, per-sample paired-interleaved (ratio=cuBLAS/AMK, >1 => AMK faster); accumulating samples over the run; crossing declared ONLY if best p10 > 1.0
honesty: int8 weight-only (W8A16), near-lossless (argmax-exact vs bf16 eager, max_err reported), vs cuBLAS bf16 — standard inference mode, precision stated. All CUDA-event medians, paired-interleaved (drift-robust). A crossing requires p10>1.0 (robustly faster across the whole run), not a lucky single reading.
